notes: The scheduled workflow checks both Banissa and Ol Kalou through the IEBC county-to-stream hierarchy every five minutes; GitHub may delay scheduled jobs under load.
Ol Kalou is a live/pre-poll target. OCR output is review-only and cannot enter the tally while atomic reference rows or ballot order remain unverified.
Individual cloud-download links are used. Download All and eye/preview controls are ignored.
